name: Pablo Ziegler
abstract: Pablo Ziegler (born September 2, 1944) is a Grammy Awards winning Argentine composer, pianist, arranger based in New York City. He is an exponent of nuevo tango, and has worked extensively as Ástor Piazzolla's regular pianist from 1978 until Piazzolla's retirement for health reasons in 1989.

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: I start doing more and more with Pablo Ziegler. With Pablo Ziegler, the Hawaiian, plus the commissions they start to commission me to write some, some Chamber music pieces.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paquito D'Rivera — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
